posts.author: t-t (Tal T)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am creating an app that is basically a table view with further functionality - custom buttons that call an external API.
I was wondering if i can import an existing template or a table view into my app and build around it.
Did anyone had any experience with that or with adding a button to call an external api?
Just to mention - Monday board webhook is not an option.

Thanks!
